comment: Default-FAIL verification contract. Every check starts at passes=false. A check may be flipped to true only after its verification command ran and the evidence file (log, report, or screenshot path relative to the repository root) was inspected. check-contract.(sh|ps1) refuses Done while any required check fails. Checks with required:false that have passes=false must carry a non-empty waiver_reason explaining why the check does not apply.

checks.waiver_reason: Non-code stack (Global Constraints): all T-008 files are shell/PowerShell scripts and Markdown; no lint toolchain is configured for this stack per risk-gate-matrix.md's stack descriptor.
Non-code stack (Global Constraints): shell/PowerShell scripts have no type system; typecheck does not apply to this stack.

No integration surface distinct from the acceptance-test fixture scenarios already covered by check-domain-conformance.Tests.ps1; the script is a standalone CLI gate with no external service/API integration to test.
Non-code stack (Global Constraints): shell/PowerShell scripts require no compilation/build step.

check-domain-conformance is a CLI gate script, not a running service/app; there is no dev server or entry point to smoke-test beyond the acceptance-test fixture invocations already covering real subprocess execution.
T-008 is a net-new script and skill-doc addition, not a refactor/bugfix task with a baseline-behavior.md; differential-test-policy does not apply.
No user-facing UI is touched by this task; check-domain-conformance is a backend CLI gate script and a quality-gate skill-doc edit only.
No design-system/ contract or UI-layer files are touched by this task.
